items.title: New: Sixers year-in-review continues today, featuring Justin Edwards.

items.body_excerpt:
New: Sixers year-in-review continues today, featuring Justin Edwards.

Where Edwards progressed in his second season, where I was surprised to see him stagnate and what he can do to become a full-blown rotation wing for his hometown team:

media.title: Sixers year-in-review: Justin Edwards' growth stops and starts in sophomore year
media.description: What does the future hold for Philadelphia native Justin Edwards after two NBA seasons?
